description: MCP server for Teamleader Focus CRM. Use Teamleader in Claude and other AI assistants.
name: io.github.boostuagency/boostu-teamleader-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Your Teamleader Focus integration Client ID
environmentVariables.name: TEAMLEADER_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Your Teamleader Focus integration Client Secret
environmentVariables.name: TEAMLEADER_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: OAuth2 refresh token from the one-time authorization
environmentVariables.name: TEAMLEADER_REFRESH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Path to persist the rotated refresh token (default .teamleader-token)
environmentVariables.name: TEAMLEADER_TOKEN_STORE

environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated tool groups to enable (default: all groups)
environmentVariables.name: TEAMLEADER_TOOLS
